ddls:
CREATE TABLE "streaming_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the streaming session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is streaming */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used for streaming */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user */,
  "stream_quality" TEXT /* Average stream quality during the session */,
  "avg_bitrate" INTEGER /* Average bitrate during the session */,
  "total_stalls" INTEGER /* Total number of stalls during the session */,
  "total_stall_duration" REAL /* Total duration of stalls during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user */,
  "watch_history" TEXT /* Watch history of the user */,
  "preferred_quality" TEXT /* Preferred video quality of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartphone, tablet, smart TV) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_software_version" TEXT /* Software version of the device */,
  "device_hardware_version" TEXT /* Hardware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the streaming session */,
  "real_time" REAL /* Real-time measurement in seconds */,
  "video_playback_time" REAL /* Playback time in seconds */,
  "video_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the video (e.g., 480p, 720p, 1080p) */,
  "bitrate" INTEGER /* Bitrate of the video stream in kbps */,
  "stall_duration" REAL /* Duration of the stall in seconds */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth available for streaming in kbps */,
  "throughput" INTEGER /* Throughput of the video stream in kbps */,
  "packet_loss_rate" REAL /* Packet loss rate during the measurement */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency during the measurement in ms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES streaming_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_content" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video content */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the video in minutes */,
  "resolution_options" TEXT /* Available resolution options for the video */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the video content */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the video content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_video_mapping" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session-video mapping */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the streaming session */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the video content */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the video playback during the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the video playback during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_video_mapping_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES streaming_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_video_mapping_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES video_content ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stall_events" (
  "stall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stall event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stall started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stall ended */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the stall (e.g., bandwidth fluctuation, server issue) */,
  "stall_type" TEXT /* Type of stall (e.g., startup stall, rebuffering stall) */,
  "stall_cause" TEXT /* Cause of the stall (e.g., bandwidth fluctuation, server issue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stall_events_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the streaming session */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of feedback (e.g., video quality, audio quality, buffering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES streaming_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "predicted_stall" INTEGER /* Prediction of a stall event */,
  "predicted_quality_drop" INTEGER /* Prediction of a drop in video quality */,
  "prediction_probability" REAL /* Probability of the predicted stall or quality drop */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cdn_nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CDN node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the CDN node */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the CDN node in terms of concurrent streams */,
  "load" INTEGER /* Current load on the CDN node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of CDN node (e.g., edge node, origin node) */,
  "node_status" TEXT /* Status of the CDN node (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_cdn_mapping" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session-CDN node mapping */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the streaming session */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the CDN node */,
  "cdn_node_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the CDN node serving the session */,
  "cdn_node_port" INTEGER /* Port number of the CDN node serving the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_cdn_mapping_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES streaming_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_cdn_mapping_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES cdn_nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network condition entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the streaming session */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth available during the session in kbps */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency experienced during the session in ms */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Packet loss percentage during the session */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., Wi-Fi, cellular, wired) */,
  "network_signal_strength" TEXT /* Signal strength of the network (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_conditions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES streaming_sessions ("session_id")
)
